seoTitle: Lune River vs Lymington — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Lune River and Lymington. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Lune River vs Lymington: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Lune River and Lymington.
heading: Lune River vs Lymington — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Lune River, Tasmania and Lymington, Tasmania. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Lune River has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Lymington (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Lune River or Lymington safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Lune River has a flood risk score of 58/100, while Lymington scores 48/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Lune River scores 20/100 for bushfire risk. Lymington scores 26/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Lune River or Lymington?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Lune River has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.2% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
